reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance. Given the extended rest of 10 days, we'll focus on rebuilding with controlled but purposeful intensity. This session targets aerobic improvements essential for the main climb at Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (7'/4') over-unders; 7' @ 242-256W, 4' @ 201-218W. This will enhance lactate clearance and fatigue resistance.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
